title: IMMZ.D.DE5 ValueSet for Reason vaccine was not administered Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZ.D.DE5 ValueSet for Reason vaccine was not administered ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)
